resources.string: A native shell for your tlbx workspace. Connect once, then use Hub inside tlbx to move between machines and workspaces.
Paste the full URL or just host:port. HTTPS is added automatically when you omit the scheme.
Need a different target later? Open tlbx Hub after you connect instead of keeping a list of saved servers here.
This address stays on the device so the same start screen is ready next time.
